name: sheleg-design-skill
description: SHELEG Design — a motion + systems methodology for cinematic, scroll-driven, particle-backed landing pages, packaged as an agent skill.

plugins.name: sheleg-design
plugins.description: One scroll clock drives many cheap, layered, independently-degradable responses (WebGL particle field, 2D fallback, parallax, scrubbed instruments, progress rail) so a landing page reads as a single precision instrument. Skill + full architecture reference + /sheleg-design command.
